name: claude-toolbox
description: Claude Code plugins for multi-agent workflows: lean subagents (MCP bloat fix) and worktree-guard (safe git operations in worktrees).

plugins.name: lean-agents
plugins.description: Lightweight subagent replacements that avoid context bloat from inherited MCP tool schemas. Provides Sonnet variants with tool filtering and Opus safe variants with 1M context.

plugins.name: worktree-guard
plugins.description: Automatic safety guards for git worktrees: blocks bad pushes, wrong branches, and provides safe sync/push/status commands. Essential for multi-agent workflows with one agent per worktree.
